overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city at night. The character travels from a covered sidewalk under an overpass, through a commercial district with Japanese-inspired architecture and red torii gates, toward the downtown skyline with towering skyscrapers and dense holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk under elevated highway with chain-link fence barrier

events.description: ego begins turning right to follow the curved sidewalk path
approaching the corner intersection with the Poplar street sign visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along covered sidewalk behind two pedestrians, following the path next to a chain-link fence

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians walking ahead of ego on the sidewalk

entered.detail: metal chain-link fence running along the right side of the sidewalk
elevated concrete highway ramp overhead creating covered walkway
multi-lane street with moving traffic to the left of the sidewalk
mid-rise residential buildings visible in the background

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, with a chain-link fence on the right and traffic on the left. The path curves right toward an intersection, following two pedestrians ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner plaza with outdoor seating and arcade machines

events.description: turns corner from fenced sidewalk into open plaza area with outdoor seating
crossing the wet street at the yellow-striped crosswalk

agents.ego_description: turning right at the corner near the Poplar sign, then crossing the street while passing people seated on outdoor benches

notable_agents.action: several pedestrians sitting on benches outside a commercial building

entered.detail: red street sign with white text reading 'Poplar' mounted on a pole
blue benches with people sitting along the building facade
illuminated arcade cabinet visible near the building entrance
building front with dark windows and neon signage

segments.scene_description: Turning the corner at Poplar street into a semi-covered plaza area with outdoor benches and an arcade machine. The character crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk, leaving the fenced sidewalk behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with red torii gates leading to downtown skyscraper district

events.description: passes through red torii gate structure into wide downtown vista with skyscrapers
camera tilts upward revealing flying vehicles and full skyline of mega-skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: walking across the open intersection toward the downtown skyline, passing through traditional red gates into the futuristic city center

notable_agents.action: futuristic car driving down the multi-lane street

entered.detail: large traditional Japanese red torii gate structure spanning the street entrance
towering futuristic glass and steel skyscrapers dominating the skyline
massive screen displaying a person's face on the side of a building
futuristic aerial vehicle hovering in the sky between buildings

segments.scene_description: Crossing the open intersection through red torii gates, the scene opens into a wide downtown vista. Massive skyscrapers with glass facades rise ahead, with flying vehicles visible in the sky between buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with Watson's Coffee and circular advertising tower

events.description: enters Watson's Coffee district with dense neon signage and holographic advertisements
futuristic vehicles pass by on the multi-lane street to the right

agents.ego_description: walking along the downtown street past Watson's Coffee, surrounded by towering neon-lit buildings and holographic advertisements

notable_agents.action: pedestrians walking along the sidewalk near storefronts

entered.detail: green building with yellow text reading 'WATSON'S COFFEE' and red neon accents
tall cylindrical building wrapped with multiple levels of digital advertising screens
elevated walkway connecting buildings above the street level
large glowing advertisement displaying animated content

segments.scene_description: Walking through the dense commercial district with Watson's Coffee on the left and a towering circular building covered in advertisements ahead. The street is lined with neon signs, holographic billboards, and red-leaf trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: hotel district intersection with prominent pink neon signage and street vendors

events.description: approaches hotel intersection with large pink neon hotel sign visible on the left
makes slight left turn while continuing forward past street vendor cart

agents.ego_description: approaching the hotel intersection with the prominent pink neon sign, navigating around street vendors and construction barriers

notable_agents.action: street vendor standing near a cart at the intersection corner

entered.detail: multi-story building with illuminated windows and commercial ground floor
large bright pink neon sign reading 'HOTEL' with Japanese characters below
small vendor stall with umbrella at the street corner
red and white striped barriers blocking part of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Approaching a busy intersection dominated by a bright pink neon hotel sign on the left. Street vendors and construction barriers occupy the sidewalk while the circular advertising tower remains visible to the right, and the downtown skyscrapers loom closer ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined urban underpass that gradually opens into a sprawling, neon-drenched futuristic metropolis. It begins along a covered sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, curving right past a chain-link fence and following pedestrians toward an intersection. As the camera turns the corner at Poplar Street, the environment shifts into a semi-covered plaza with arcade machines and benches before crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk. The scene then expands through red torii gates into a wide downtown vista, where the horizon opens to reveal massive glass skyscrapers and flying vehicles soaring between buildings. Finally, the path leads through a dense commercial district lined with holographic billboards and red-leaf trees, passing Watson's Coffee and a towering circular advertising hub before approaching a busy intersection dominated by a bright pink neon hotel sign.
